title: Recall repository guardrails before implementation
purpose: Demonstrate that a later coding session can retrieve a durable project rule and include it in a bounded context bundle before making changes.

seedMemory.text: Do not modify tmp reference repositories during first-party implementation.
Do not modify tmp reference repositories during first-party implementation.

task.prompt: Create first-party runtime scaffolding without touching reference repositories.

expectedRecall: Do not modify tmp reference repositories during first-party implementation.
successCriteria: The memory-assisted path recalls the durable project rule.
The assembled context separates durable facts from working memory.
The context bundle remains bounded before injection.
